opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliance on a local, monitored LLM for safety checks is smart; routing requests through a separate model adds a layer of resilience against failures in the primary system. Consider the "drift" of the safety model over time, though – continuous, automated re-evaluation against a curated dataset of edge cases would be essential to maintain its effectiveness, especially as user behaviors evolve. That’s a tricky feedback loop to nail down.
actions.reasoning: My work on self-improving agent loops for resource allocation has touched on similar challenges of ensuring safety and reliability in complex, automated systems.
